# Let's load the two files and implement search utilities.
import json, re, unicodedata, math
from difflib import SequenceMatcher

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-D3aKALkQAv6nYj9sKob7Ho-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran_data = json.load(f)

# Determine structure
type(quran_data), len(quran_data), list(quran_data[0].keys())[:10]

with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadith_data = json.load(f)
type(hadith_data), len(hadith_data), list(hadith_data[0].keys())[:15]

import re

def normalize_ar(text):
    # remove tashkeel
    diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
    text = diacritics.sub('', text)
    # normalize alef forms
    text = re.sub('[\u0622\u0623\u0625\u0671]', 'ا', text)  # آ,أ,إ,ٱ -> ا
    # normalize yaa and taa marbuta
    text = text.replace('ى', 'ي')
    text = text.replace('ة', 'ه')
    # normalize hamza on waw/ya:
    text = text.replace('ؤ', 'و').replace('ئ', 'ي').replace('ء', '')
    # remove tatweel
    text = text.replace('ـ', '')
    # remove punctuation and non-letters digits
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', ' ', text, flags=re.UNICODE)
    # remove digits (Arabic-Indic and European)
    text = re.sub(r'[\d\u0660-\u0669]', ' ', text)
    # flatten spaces
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip().lower()
    return text

# Build normalized ayah texts
for d in quran_data:
    d['ayah_text_norm'] = normalize_ar(d['ayah_text'])

# Build normalized hadith fields available: hadithTxt and Matn
for d in hadith_data:
    for k in ('hadithTxt', 'Matn'):
        if k in d and d[k] is not None:
            d[k+'_norm'] = normalize_ar(d[k])
        else:
            d[k+'_norm'] = None

def best_matches_in_quran(query, topk=10):
    qn = normalize_ar(query)
    res = []
    for d in quran_data:
        s = d['ayah_text_norm']
        # similarity by SequenceMatcher ratio
        ratio = SequenceMatcher(None, qn, s).ratio()
        # also token overlap F1 style:
        q_tokens = set(qn.split())
        s_tokens = set(s.split())
        if q_tokens:
            prec = len(q_tokens & s_tokens) / len(q_tokens)
        else:
            prec = 0.0
        if s_tokens:
            rec = len(q_tokens & s_tokens) / len(s_tokens)
        else:
            rec = 0.0
        if prec+rec > 0:
            f1 = 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)
        else:
            f1 = 0.0
        res.append((max(ratio, f1), ratio, f1, d))
    res.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
    return res[:topk]

def best_matches_in_hadith(query, topk=10):
    qn = normalize_ar(query)
    res = []
    for d in hadith_data:
        # pick Matn if present else hadithTxt? We'll compute both and take best
        fields = []
        if d.get('Matn_norm'):
            fields.append(('Matn', d['Matn_norm'], d['Matn']))
        if d.get('hadithTxt_norm'):
            fields.append(('hadithTxt', d['hadithTxt_norm'], d['hadithTxt']))
        best_ratio = 0.0
        best_f1 = 0.0
        best_field = None
        for fieldname, s_norm, s_orig in fields:
            ratio = SequenceMatcher(None, qn, s_norm).ratio()
            q_tokens = set(qn.split()); s_tokens = set(s_norm.split()); 
            if q_tokens:
                prec = len(q_tokens & s_tokens) / len(q_tokens)
            else:
                prec = 0.0
            if s_tokens:
                rec = len(q_tokens & s_tokens) / len(s_tokens)
            else:
                rec = 0.0
            f1 = 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec) if (prec+rec)>0 else 0.0
            score = max(ratio, f1)
            if score > best_ratio:
                best_ratio = score; best_f1 = f1; best_field = fieldname
        res.append((best_ratio, best_f1, d['hadithID'], d))
    res.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
    return res[:topk]

query_full = "إِنَّا أَنْزَلْنَاهُ فَإِنَّهُ لَكُمْ لَغُذَاوَةٌ وَرَحْمَةٌ"
print(query_full)
print(normalize_ar(query_full))
matches_quran = best_matches_in_quran(query_full, topk=10)
[(m[0], m[1], m[2], m[3]['surah_name'], m[3]['ayah_id'], m[3]['ayah_text'][:80]) for m in matches_quran]

matches_hadith = best_matches_in_hadith("إِنَّا أَنْزَلْنَاهُ فَإِنَّهُ لَكُمْ لَغُذَاوَةٌ وَرَحْمَةٌ", topk=5)
matches_hadith[:3]

len(cands), cands[:10]

target = "وَنَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكَ الْكِتَابَ تِبْيَانًا لِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَهُدًى وَرَحْمَةً"

from difflib import SequenceMatcher

# token f1
qt=set(qn.split()); st=set(sn.split())

f1 = 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)
ratio, prec, rec, f1

target2 = "أَوَلَمْ يَكْفِهِمْ أَنَّا أَنْزَلْنَا عَلَيْكَ الْكِتَابَ يُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ ۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَرَحْمَةً وَذِكْرَىٰ لِقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ"
qn = normalize_ar("إِنَّا أَنْزَلْنَاهُ فَإِنَّهُ لَكُمْ لَغُذَاوَةٌ وَرَحْمَةٌ")
sn = normalize_ar(target2)
ratio = SequenceMatcher(None, qn, sn).ratio()
qt=set(qn.split()); st=set(sn.split())
prec = len(qt&st)/len(qt); rec = len(qt&st)/len(st)
f1 = 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)
ratio, prec, rec, f1

# search quran for "غذاء" or "غذاوة"
search_quran_phrase("غذاء")[:3], search_quran_phrase("غذاوة")[:3], search_quran_phrase("غذاوه")[:3]
